_meta.description: HELD-OUT test set. Brands deliberately NOT in the demo bilingual lexicon (Bose/GoPro/Nespresso/Logitech/Philips/Garmin/LEGO). Measures whether the hybrid blocker generalizes beyond the brands its lexicon was hand-authored for.
_meta.expectation: Pairs that share a latin SKU/model code in BOTH listings should still block (deterministic model key is brand-agnostic). Pairs whose Korean listing transliterates the brand/model (no shared latin token) should MISS — that is the lexicon's limit and the case a multilingual encoder is needed for.

listings.title: Bose QuietComfort 45 Wireless Headphones Black QC45
보스 콰이어트컴포트45 무선 헤드폰 블랙 QC45 정품
listings.note: KR but shares latin QC45 -> should block

listings.title: Bose QuietComfort 45 Wireless Headphones Blue QC45
listings.note: COLOR VARIANT of HE1 - must stay separate

listings.title: 고프로 히어로12 블랙 액션캠 정품
listings.note: 히어로12 transliterated -> no shared latin model -> hard miss

listings.title: 로지텍 MX Master 3S 무선 마우스 정품
listings.note: KR keeps latin 'MX Master 3S' -> lexical/charngram can bridge

listings.title: Garmin Fenix 7 Sapphire Solar GPS Watch
가민 페닉스7 사파이어 솔라 GPS 워치 정품
listings.note: 페닉스7 transliterated, shares only 'gps' -> likely miss

listings.title: 필립스 소닉케어 다이아몬드클린 HX9924 칫솔 정품
레고 스타워즈 밀레니엄 팔콘 75192 정품
listings.note: shares only numeric SKU 75192 -> charngram may bridge
